TFT 17: SPACE GODS
Desktop App Download
App Download
TFT 17 GODS
Instead of Carousel, you choose an offering from one of two Gods, then collect an extra reward from Pengu. At 4-7, your chosen God returns with a powerful Boon.
  • Ahri
    God of Opulence
    Offers gold, XP, and reroll rewards.
    Stage 2
    • 6 gold
    • 8 XP
    • 5 Rerolls
    • 6 gold, maybe +1
    Stage 3
    • 8 gold
    • 7 Rerolls
    • 10 XP
    • 8 gold, maybe +2
    Stage 4
    • 12 gold
    • 8 Rerolls
    • 12 Gold, maybe +3
    4-7 Reward
    • Gain 2 gold, 2 XP, and 2 rerolls each round
  • Aurelion Sol
    God of Wonders
    Offers economy and emblem rewards.
    Stage 2
    • Reach 50 gold to gain component anvil + 4 gold
    • Field 6 non-unqiue traits to get a random emblem and a reforger
    Stage 3
    • Star up a unit to get 10 gold
    • Field 6 non-unqiue traits to get a random emblem and a reforger
    Stage 4
    • Reach level 9 to get 20 gold
    4-7 Reward
    • Choose one of three trials to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol
  • Ekko
    God of Time
    Offers delayed rewards and special loot.
    Stage 2
    • Scuttle Puddle (+blue orb & 3 gold)
    • Blessing at 30 HP (25g value)
    • Spat in 4 rounds
    • Artifact in 8 rounds
    • 4-cost in 3 rounds
    Stage 3
    • Scuttle Puddle (+blue orb & 4 gold)
    • Implant (20% AS)
    • 2x5 cost in 4 rounds
    • Component anvil in 3 rounds
    Stage 4
    • Artifact in 5 rounds
    • Completed Anvil in 4 rounds
    • 2 gold every turn
    • Full 5-cost shop in 3 rounds
    • Implant (20% AS)
    4-7 Reward
    • Gain the Anomaly item, which provides unique bonuses based on role
  • Evelynn
    God of Temptation
    Offers stronger rewards in exchange for Tactician health.
    Stage 2
    • 8g, Lose 1 HP per
    • 2* 2 cost, -1HP
    • 2x lesser dupe, no shop 2 rounds
    Stage 3
    • 11g, Lose 1 HP Per
    • Random emblem, -3HP
    • 15 gold no shop 2 rounds
    • 2* 3 cost and -2 HP
    • 3* 1 cost and -2 HP
    Stage 4
    • 14g, Lose 1 HP Per
    • 2* 4 cost and -3 HP
    • Completed item -5 HP
    • 18 gold no shop 2 rounds
    4-7 Reward
    • Your team gains 10% Durability. Lose an additional 1 health when you lose combat
  • Kayle
    God of Order
    Offers component item rewards.
    Stage 2
    • Random Component
    • Sparring Glove
    • Recurve Bow
    • Tear of the Goddess
    Stage 3
    • Random Component
    • B.F. Sword
    • Chain Vest
    • Needlessly Large Rod
    • Negatron Cloak
    Stage 4
    • Random Component
    • Sparring Glove
    • Recurve Bow
    • Tear of the Goddess
    • B.F. Sword
    • Chain Vest
    • Needlessly Large Rod
    • Negatron Cloak
    4-7 Reward
    • Upgrade a random completed item to Radiant
  • Soraka
    God of Stars
    Offers health and health-based rewards.
    Stage 2
    • 8 HP, maybe 3g
    • 12 HP
    • Giant's Belt
    Stage 3
    • 8 HP, maybe 5g
    • 12 HP
    • Giant's Belt
    • Implant (350 HP)
    Stage 4
    • 8 HP, maybe 5g
    • 12 HP
    • Giant's Belt
    • Implant (350 HP)
    4-7 Reward
    • Team gains 2 HP per missing Tactician health. +1 current and max health Tactician each round
  • Thresh
    God of Pacts
    Offers random loot and gold.
    Stage 2
    • Random + 2g
    • Random loot (EV 7)
    Stage 3
    • Random + 3g
    • Random loot (EV 9)
    Stage 4
    • Random + 5g
    • Random loot (EV 10)
    4-7 Reward
    • After each player combat, roll a die. Gain rewards based on the result
  • Varus
    God of Love
    Offers champions, duplicators, and shop-based rewards.
    Stage 2
    • 2 & 3 Cost
    • Owned 3 cost
    • 2 Tiny Dupes
    • 3 cost shop
    Stage 3
    • 3 & 4 Cost
    • Lesser Dupe
    • Owned 3 cost
    • 4 cost shop
    Stage 4
    • 4 & 5 Cost
    • Lesser Dupe + 3g
    • 1 Lesser Duplicator + 5 Tiny Duplicators
    • Owned 4 cost
    • 1% 5 cost odds
    4-7 Reward
    • Your team gains 10 health for each total star level in your army. Increase your 5 cost odds by 4%
  • Yasuo
    God of the Abyss
    Offers empowered combat hex effects.
    Stage 2
    • Fire Hex (18% dmg, burn/wound)
    • Wood Hex (10% + 30 HP)
    • Wind Hex (30% AS)
    • Ice Hex (15% heal)
    • Electric Hex (2s stun)
    • Socialite Hex (2 mana regen)
    Stage 3
    • Fire Hex (18% dmg, burn/wound)
    • Wind Hex (30% AS)
    • Ice Hex (15% heal)
    • Electric Hex (2s stun)
    • Socialite Hex (2 mana regen)
    Stage 4
    • Fire Hex (18% dmg, burn/wound)
    • Wind Hex (30% AS)
    • Ice Hex (15% heal)
    • Electric Hex (2s stun)
    • Socialite Hex (2 mana regen)
    4-7 Reward
    • Increase the power of Yasuo's hexes by 50%. If you only have 2 hexes, gain 12 gold.
TFT 17 Core Changes
The Realm of the Gods
Carousel is replaced by offerings from two Gods, followed by a smaller bonus from Pengu.
Divine Boons
At 4-7, your chosen God returns with a powerful Boon and keeps rewarding your faith with periodic loot.
Galactic Champions and Creatures
Preview the new champions, traits, and summons arriving with Space Gods.
  • GODS
  • Origin
  • Class
  • Unique
  • Champion
  • Augment
  • Items
  • Arena
  • Tactician
New Set 17 Origin Synergies
  • Bulwark

    Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 10% max Health shield and 10% Attack Speed.

  • Dark Lady

    Your team gains 4% Durability, increased to ?% when Morgana is in her Dark Form.

  • Doomer

    Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom.

  • Eradicator

    Enemies have 10% less Armor and Magic Resist.

  • Factory New

    After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves.

    Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

  • Oracle

    Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

    Rounds Remaining: ?

  • Redeemer
    (1)
    For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains 2% Attack Speed, and 2 Armor and Magic Resist.
  • Anima

    After losing a player combat, gain 20 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown.

    Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.

    (3)
    Start Researching!
    (6)
    After each player combat, gain loot!
  • Arbiter

    Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

    (2)
    Choose a cause and effect for your law
    (3)
    Effects are stronger.
  • Dark Star

    Dark Star units create a black hole that devours enemies below 10% max Health. The higher the trait tier, the stronger the black hole becomes.

    (2)
    Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at ?%8% max health.
    (4)
    AND they gain 45% .
    (6)
    AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 70% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes.
    (9)
    All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.
  • Mecha

    Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining 40% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

    (3)
    Energy Cells: Mechas gain 25% .
    (4)
    Overclocked Cells: Increased to 40% .
    (6)
    Precision Engineering: +1 max team size
  • Meeple

    Meeple attract Meeps that empower Meeple abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.

    (3)
    2 , 100
    (5)
    3 , 350
    (7)
    4 , 450 . Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.
    (10)
    6 , 550 . SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS!
  • N.O.V.A.
    (2)
    6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.
    (5)
    Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge.
  • Primordian
    (2)
    Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on unique Primordian star level.
    (3)
    Spawn 45% more Swarmlings! After each player combat, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion.
  • Psionic

    Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

    (2)
    Gain the ?
    (4)
    Gain the ?, Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units
  • Space Groove

    Space Groove units can enter the Groove state. While in Groove, their bonuses scale with the number of Space Groove allies and grow stronger at higher trait tiers.

    (1)
    Groovians can enter Space Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.
    (3)
    All Groovians start combat in Space Groove for 4 seconds.
    (5)
    Each second spent in Space Groove grants 5% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.
    (7)
    Increase these effects by 10%!
    (10)
    {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_Groove}}
  • Stargazer
    (3)
    units.

    More hexes reveal at each player level.
  • Stargazer (The Altar)

      Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Altar.

      (3)
      When ANY champion dies, they are sacrificed to the Altar. Allies in empowered hexes gain 8% Health and 8% Attack Speed.After 60 sacrifices, Stargazers in empowered hexes gain an additional 20% and 18% Sacrifices: (? / 60)
    • Stargazer (The Boar)

        Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Boar.

        Gain gold after winning player combat. Allies in empowered hexes gain 8% Health, Attack Damage, and Ability Power. Stargazers gain more.

        (Gold Earned: ?)

        (6)

      • Stargazer (The Fountain)

          Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Fountain.

          Allies in empowered hexes heal ?% max Health every ? seconds. Stargazers in empowered hexes heal an additional ?% and gain stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power every ? seconds.

          (3)

          (5)
          ?%
        • Stargazer (The Huntress)

            Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Huntress.

            Combat Start: Mark the highest Health enemies.

            Allies in empowered hexes gain 15% Attack Speed. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and heal for 15% of their max Health when a marked enemy dies.

          • Stargazer (The Medallion)

              Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Medallion.

              (3)
              Allies in empowered hexes gain 15% Damage Amp, which increases by 5% for each 3-star ally.
            • Stargazer (The Mountain)

                Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Mountain

                Every 5 player combats, gain a Stargazer Emblem. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses.

                (Combats Remaining: ?)

                (7)

                (8)

              • Stargazer (The Serpent)

                  Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Serpent.

                  Allies in empowered hexes gain 5% Durability. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and poison enemies, repeating a portion of damage dealt as magic damage over 3 seconds.

                  (5)

                • Timebreaker
                  (2)
                  Allies gain 15% Attack Speed.
                  (3)
                  AND When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).
                  (4)
                  AND Timebreakers gain an additional 50% Attack Speed
                New Set 17 Class Synergies
                • Commander
                  (1)
                  Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.
                • Divine Duelist

                  Your Tactician heals for 15% of player damage dealt from winning.

                • Galaxy Hunter

                  Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment.

                • Gun Goddess

                  When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

                • Party Animal

                  Once per combat, after falling below 45% percent Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in Space Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

                • Bastion

                  Your team gains 15 Armor and Magic Resist.

                  Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat.

                  40

                  (4)
                  Gain 20% Crit Chance and 20% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.
                • Marauder

                  Your team gains 5% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health.)

                  Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

                • Rogue

                  Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

                  Vanguards gain 5% Durability while Shielded.

                  Combat start and 50% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for 10 seconds.

                Augments
                Check out the new Set 17 augments and the rounds where they can appear.
                Tier
                Round
                Poppy Hero
                2-1

                Gain a Poppy. Poppy becomes a ranged Marksman and her attacks Meeps at her target.

                Aatrox Hero
                2-1

                Aatrox's spell is now a low-mana three-hit combo that heals him for a portion of the damage dealt. When his NOVA move happens, he gains maximum health and size.

                Bonk!
                2-1

                Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target ability that gets stronger with each kill.

                Charge Transfer I
                3-24-2

                Your team gains 5% Damage Amp. 50% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.

                The Tower
                2-13-24-2

                Gain a massive Training Dummy that zaps nearby enemies

                Group Hug I
                3-24-2

                Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 6 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

                Expedition
                2-1

                At the start of planning phase, lose the right-most champion on your bench. After losing 33 gold of units this way, gain a powerful reward.

                Forge a Friend
                4-2

                The next 1-cost champion you purchase is 3-star.

                Size Matters
                3-2

                Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion begins combat with more than 3800 max Health, gain another.

                Feeling Lucky
                3-2

                Gain 12 gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain 3 more gold.

                Cognitive Tax
                2-1

                Gain 8 gold and 1 XP.

                Cognitive Tax+
                3-2

                Gain 12 gold and 3 XP.

                Kick Start
                2-1

                Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and 1 gold.

                Anima Commander
                2-1

                Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by 10.

                Sniper's Nest
                2-13-2

                Snipers gain 8% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to 32%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.

                May the Fours Be With You
                4-2

                Your 4 cost champions and Jhin gain 204 Health and 14% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.

                Invader Zed
                3-2

                Gain a Bloodthirster. On Stage 4-1, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops. Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

                Reach For the Stars
                2-1

                Jax gains stacking attack speed with every attack. On cast, jump to a nearby enemy, dealing damage and adding stacking on-hit damage for the rest of combat.

                Meep Space 9
                2-1

                Meepsie gains a weaker version of Brock's spell and heavy attack damage.

                Star Conqueror
                2-1

                Mordekaiser becomes an auto-attack based AP carry, whose channel is a burst of attack speed for as long as he has mana to spend. At combat start and on kill, he gains a non-mana-locking shield.

                Self Destruct
                2-1

                Gain a Gragas. Gragas now self detonates, sacrificing 20% of max Health to deal XXX (AP) plus the sacrificed Health as magic damage in a four hex radius, reduced by 20% per hex from the epicenter.

                Contract Killer
                2-1

                Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke gains a resetting ability and generates gold on takedown.

                Side Effects
                3-24-2

                When an ally is healed, they deal 50% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every 5 seconds, allies heal for 5% of their max Health.

                Misfits
                2-1

                Your team gains 75 Health for each active Unique trait. Gain a Miss Fortune and a Rhaast.

                Booster Pack
                2-1

                Gain 11 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 3-Cost guaranteed!)

                Booster Pack+
                3-2

                Gain 18 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 4-Cost guaranteed!)

                Booster Pack++
                4-2

                Gain 30 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 5-Cost guaranteed!)

                Charge Transfer II
                3-24-2

                Your team gains 8% Damage Amp. 80% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.

                Group Hug II
                3-24-2

                Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 9 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

                Frontline Foundation
                2-1

                Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.

                Kahunahuna
                2-13-2

                Every 5th attack deals bonus true damage equal to 200% Basic Attack Damage.

                Cosmic Restart
                3-2

                Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain 2 random Emblems and 10 free Shop rerolls.

                Cognitive Overload
                3-2

                Gain 7 Gold, 1 2-star 1-cost champion, 1 2-cost champion, 2 3-cost champions, 1 XP, and 1 Shop reroll.

                Backline Blueprint
                2-1

                Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.

                Money Hungry
                2-1

                Gain 10 gold now, then 7 gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

                Five-Pointed Star
                4-2

                At the start of each stage, the first champion you buy from a specific tier is 2-star. Gain a 2-star 1-cost champion and 2 gold now. Stage 2: 2-cost Stage 3: 3-cost Stage 4: 4-cost Stage 5: 5-cost

                Just Hit
                4-2

                Gain a Champion Duplicator, 18 Shop rerolls, and 10 gold.

                Golden Gamble
                2-13-24-2

                Flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain a random Radiant item and a Reforger.

                Baron's Lair
                2-13-24-2

                Gain a Tank item. After 8 seconds of combat, your team gains 5% Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.

                New Items
                Explore the Psionic items, Command Mods, and new emblems revealed in the official Set 17 overview.
                Drone Uplink

                A drone repeats 25% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every 3 seconds.

                At (4): If the holder is Psionic, gain an additional mini-drone that repeats 20% of damage.

                Recommended users: Sona, Viktor

                Malware Matrix

                Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by 2.

                At (4): If the holder is Psionic, every 3rd attack cleaves, dealing 75 physical damage to nearby enemies.

                Recommended users: Master Yi, Pyke

                Biomatter Preserver

                Gain 5% max Health and deploy 3 Life Orbs. Every 5 seconds of combat, one drops restoring 18% of the holder's missing Health.

                At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they gain 22% increased healing from all sources.

                Recommended users: Gragas

                Sympathetic Implant

                Every 5 seconds, gain 1 additional Mana Per Second.

                At (4): If the holder is Psionic, their abilities deal 20% of their ability damage as true damage instead.

                Recommended users: Sona, Viktor

                Target-Lock Optics

                The holder's first attack on each enemy deals 150 additional damage.

                At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they heal 12% of their max Health whenever their target dies.

                Recommended users: Pyke, Master Yi

                Command Mod: Exhaust

                Command a unit's attacks to Burn, Wound, and Chill.

                Command Mod: Doublestrike

                Command a unit to have a 25% chance to attack twice when attacking.

                Command Mod: Analyze

                Command a unit to grant you 1 XP every 3 seconds it is alive during player combat.

                Command Mod: Brace

                Command a unit to gain a 20% Health shield for 8 seconds at the start of combat.

                Command Mod: Transmute

                Command a unit to drop 2 gold each time it kills an enemy during player combat.

                Command Mod: Disrupt

                Command a unit to Stun enemies within 3 hexes for 1 second when it dies.

                Command Mod: Optimize

                Command a unit to reduce their mana cost by 15%.

                Command Mod: Fabricate

                Command a unit to gain a temporary recommended item at the start of combat.
